{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = South Provisional Rules
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[South Provisional Rules]] require fighters to change weapons after the fifth match in a row.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
